creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 149977
Patch to update security/tor to 0.2.5.10 and security/tor-devel to 0.2.6.1-alpha

Hi,
It looks like nobody has updated the FreeBSD port security/tor in about 2 months. I have patches to update both security/tor and security/tor-devel to their respective latest versions: 0.2.5.10 and 0.2.6.1-alpha. I also have the Poudriere build logs for both of these ports, which I will upload shortly.
Thanks,
Neel
